# CTFontUIFontType

**Enumeration**

Constants that represent the specific user-interface purpose to specify for font creation.

## Declaration

```swift
enum CTFontUIFontType
```

## Overview

Use these constants with the [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTFontCreateUIFontForLanguage(_:_:_:)] function to indicate the intended user interface use of the font reference to be created.

## Constants

- **CTFontUIFontType.none**: The user-interface font type isn’t specified.
- **CTFontUIFontType.user**: The default font for documents and other text whose font the user can typically change.
- **CTFontUIFontType.userFixedPitch**: The default font for documents and other text under the user’s control when that font is fixed-pitch.
- **CTFontUIFontType.system**: The system font for standard user-interface items, such as button labels and menu items.
- **CTFontUIFontType.emphasizedSystem**: The system font for emphasis in alerts.
- **CTFontUIFontType.smallSystem**: The standard small system font for informative text in alerts, column headings in lists, help tags, and small controls.
- **CTFontUIFontType.smallEmphasizedSystem**: The small system font for emphasis.
- **CTFontUIFontType.miniSystem**: The standard miniature system font for mini controls and utility window labels and text.
- **CTFontUIFontType.miniEmphasizedSystem**: The miniature system font for emphasis.
- **CTFontUIFontType.views**: The default view font for text in lists and tables.
- **CTFontUIFontType.application**: The default font for text documents.
- **CTFontUIFontType.label**: The font for labels and tick marks on full-size sliders.
- **CTFontUIFontType.menuTitle**: The font for menu titles.
- **CTFontUIFontType.menuItem**: The font for menu items.
- **CTFontUIFontType.menuItemMark**: The font to draw menu-item marks.
- **CTFontUIFontType.menuItemCmdKey**: The font for menu-item command-key equivalents.
- **CTFontUIFontType.windowTitle**: The font for window titles.
- **CTFontUIFontType.pushButton**: The font for a push button, a rounded rectangular button with a text label on it.
- **CTFontUIFontType.utilityWindowTitle**: The font for utility window titles.
- **CTFontUIFontType.alertHeader**: The font for alert headers.
- **CTFontUIFontType.systemDetail**: The standard system font for details.
- **CTFontUIFontType.emphasizedSystemDetail**: The system font for emphasis in details.
- **CTFontUIFontType.toolbar**: The font used for labels of toolbar items.
- **CTFontUIFontType.smallToolbar**: The small font for labels of toolbar items.
- **CTFontUIFontType.message**: The font for standard interface items, such as button labels and menu items.
- **CTFontUIFontType.palette**: The font in tool palettes.
- **CTFontUIFontType.toolTip**: The font for tool tips.
- **CTFontUIFontType.controlContent**: The font for contents of user-interface controls.

## Deprecated

- **kCTFontNoFontType**: The user-interface font type isn’t specified.
- **kCTFontUserFontType**: The font used by default for documents and other text under the user’s control.
- **kCTFontUserFixedPitchFontType**: The font used by default for documents and other text under the user’s control when that font is fixed-pitch.
- **kCTFontSystemFontType**: The system font used for standard user-interface items, such as button labels and menu items.
- **kCTFontEmphasizedSystemFontType**: The system font used for emphasis in alerts.
- **kCTFontSmallSystemFontType**: The standard small system font used for informative text in alerts, column headings in lists, help tags, and small controls.
- **kCTFontSmallEmphasizedSystemFontType**: The small system font used for emphasis.
- **kCTFontMiniSystemFontType**: The standard miniature system font used for mini controls and utility window labels and text.
- **kCTFontMiniEmphasizedSystemFontType**: The miniature system font used for emphasis.
- **kCTFontViewsFontType**: The view font used as the default font of text in lists and tables.
- **kCTFontApplicationFontType**: The default font for text documents.
- **kCTFontLabelFontType**: The font used for labels and tick marks on full-size sliders.
- **kCTFontMenuTitleFontType**: The font used for menu titles.
- **kCTFontMenuItemFontType**: The font used for menu items.
- **kCTFontMenuItemMarkFontType**: The font used to draw menu-item marks.
- **kCTFontMenuItemCmdKeyFontType**: The font used for menu-item command-key equivalents.
- **kCTFontWindowTitleFontType**: The font used for window titles.
- **kCTFontPushButtonFontType**: The font used for a push button, a rounded rectangular button with a text label on it.
- **kCTFontUtilityWindowTitleFontType**: The font used for utility window titles.
- **kCTFontAlertHeaderFontType**: The font used for alert headers.
- **kCTFontSystemDetailFontType**: The standard system font used for details.
- **kCTFontEmphasizedSystemDetailFontType**: The system font used for emphasis in details.
- **kCTFontToolbarFontType**: The font used for labels of toolbar items.
- **kCTFontSmallToolbarFontType**: The small font used for labels of toolbar items.
- **kCTFontMessageFontType**: The font used for standard interface items, such as button labels and menu items.
- **kCTFontPaletteFontType**: The font used in tool palettes.
- **kCTFontToolTipFontType**: The font used for tool tips.
- **kCTFontControlContentFontType**: The font used for contents of user-interface controls.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Enumerations

- **CTFontTableTag**: Font table tags provide access to font table data.
- **CTFontTableOptions**: Constants that describe font table options.
- **CTFontOptions**: Options for font creation and descriptor matching.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
